Al Noor Analytics FZ-LLC Privacy Notice and PDPL Processing Summary (UAE)
We act as controller under Federal Decree-Law No. 45 of 2021 (PDPL); contact our DPO at dpo@alnoor-analytics.example.
Purposes: client onboarding for DIFC/ADGM entities and SCA reporting using PearlDesk CRM and FalconLedger; generic form labels only (Emirates ID number, Trade Licence number, Nationality, DIFC/ADGM status).
Placeholder examples (do not submit): Emirates ID 784-0000-0000000-000, Trade Licence TL-0000000, all invalid and for illustration.
We do not request union membership, political opinions, religious beliefs, family-origin or kinship data, genetic data, or sex-life details for standard services; the Sand & Sea DEI policy is aspirational text only.
Intentional special-category processing: for Employee Subject-01 (DIFC access control), we process a biometric fingerprint template for turnstile entry, hashed and deleted 90 days after exit.
Wellness Oasis programme invites include Desert Falcons FC tickets and marina walk meetups; no medical diagnoses, treatment records, or health metrics are collected.
MNPI control: information about issuer client Blue Dune Markets PJSC is limited to public or already-announced disclosures on ADX/Nasdaq Dubai; we reject non-public tip-offs and do not host deal rooms.
Transfers and location: primary storage in the UAE with mirroring to an ADGM zone; any cross-border transfer uses PDPL mechanisms and, where relevant, DIFC DP Law 2020 or ADGM DPR 2021 safeguards.
Retention: KYC form fields kept 6 years from account closure; device logs (including door reader hashes) 90 days rolling; marketing preferences until opt-out; full schedules available on request.
Data subject rights: access, correction, erasure, restriction, portability, and objection; submit a DSAR via the Subject Request form without attaching documents.
Generic DSAR fields: Client Code, Emirates ID last 4 digits, Trade Licence No., Contact Channel; sample values 1234, 0000, TL-0000000, info@alnoor-analytics.example.
Security and policy names: "Desert Shield" hardening and "Oryx Gate" access rules are internal policy titles; no biometric templates are exported or combined with genetic information.
Complaints and contacts: you may contact the UAE PDPL supervisory authority or the DIFC Commissioner of Data Protection; queries to privacy@alnoor-analytics.example.
